name: BACTERIAL ENDOCARDITIS
dominant_finding: peripheral cavitary (septic) lung nodules → assess for right-sided valvular vegetations
distribution: peripheral cavitary (septic) lung nodules → assess for right-sided valvular vegetations
discriminating_features: exaggerated valve motion (= disintegration of suture line + regurgitation)
peripheral cavitary (septic) lung nodules → assess for right-sided valvular vegetations
usually discrete focal echodensities with sharp edges; may show fuzzy / shaggy
may appear as shaggy echoes that prolapse when the valve is closed (DDx to mitral
routinely depicts vegetations > 1 cm in diameter
